ApiKeysPage.title: API Keys
ApiKeysPage.description: Manage your API keys and view their details.

CreateApiKeyDialog.limitZero: The API key limit for this instance is set to 0, which means you cannot create any API keys. Please contact your administrator for more information.
CreateApiKeyDialog.limitExceeded: You have reached the maximum number of API keys allowed for your account. ({current}/{limit})

toast.creationSuccess: Your API key has been created successfully.
toast.creationFailed: Failed to create API key. Please try again.

dialog.successDescription: Your new API key has been created successfully. Please copy and store it securely, as it will not be shown again.
dialog.createDescription: Fill in the details below to create a new API key.

toast.apiKeyDiseased: The API key has been disabled.
toast.apiKeyEnabled: The API key has been enabled.
toast.apiKeyToggleFailed: Failed to update API key status. Please try again.
toast.apiKeyDeleted: The API key has been deleted.
toast.apiKeyDeleteFailed: Failed to delete API key. Please try again.

empty.title: No API Keys Yet
empty.description: You haven't created any API keys yet. Click the button below to create your first API key.

ApiKeysTable.input.searchPlaceholder: Search API keys by name or ID...

dialog.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the API key "{name}" (ID: {id})? This action cannot be undone.
